contract_claim: L532-533: The `_PARSERS` dict maps `setup.cfg` and `Pipfile` to `_parse_requirements_txt` with comments noting the parser misses INI/TOML structure. These are accurate limitation notes, but `discover_manifests` includes both files via `_MANIFEST_FILES`, meaning callers will receive silently incomplete results for these formats without any warning at runtime.
observed_behavior: Either implement proper parsers for `setup.cfg` (INI `[options] install_requires`) and `Pipfile` (TOML `[packages]`), or emit a warning when these manifests are parsed so callers know coverage is partial.
